nasb.text: And He was teaching daily in the temple; but the chief priests and the scribes and the leading men among the people were trying to destroy Him,

esv.text: And he was teaching daily in the temple. The chief priests and the scribes and the principal men of the people were seeking to destroy him,

cnv.text: 他天天在聖殿裡教導人，祭司長、經學家和民間的首領，都想殺害他；

ccb.text: 祂天天在圣殿教导人，祭司长、律法教师和百姓的官长都想杀祂，

csbs.text: 耶稣天天在圣殿里教导人。祭司长们、经文士们和民间的首领们想要杀害他，
